title: Utility & Models
body:
This texture pack adds commisioned weapons, hats and more. All these textures are mainly used for a server going by the name of TTRP, a dnd inspired minecraft server. This pack allows users to order their own items with in-game currency to get these cosmetics.

Make sure to join our discord for requests: [Utility & Models Discord](https://discord.gg/DmHHzX7f77)

- Unless approved by the person who ordered the model/texture, you cannot use said model/texture. - If seen running around with the texture you can get player reported for use of a service without abiding TOS.
- Don’t edit the original pack file unless you ask permission first.
- You can share the pack with anyone as long as they also follow the TOS. Please share the pack inside the discord server. Please do not share the file as it may be outdated, share the discord server.
- If found breaking the TOS you will also be banned from the discord server and you shall no longer be able to use the textures.
